caption: A man with brown hair, wearing a light-colored collared shirt under a dark blazer, is speaking during a presentation. He is positioned against a white backdrop featuring various blue logos and text, including "DataSV 2015," "theCUBE," and "#BigDataSV." A light blue graphic banner spans the bottom of the scene. In the initial frames, the banner displays the text "RISHI YADAV | @meditativesoul," followed by "CEO" and "infoobjects" in smaller lettering. As the sequence progresses, the man maintains a consistent expression and posture, slightly gesturing with his hands while speaking. In the final frame, the text on the blue banner changes to "#theCUBE LIVE at #BigDataSV 2015," accompanied by "Fairmont Hotel - Valley Room" and "San Jose, CA." A clear plastic water bottle sits on a surface behind the banner.
